author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(Travis): don't build docs (algolia/react-instantsearch#35)
body:
* chore(Travis): don't build docs

Seeing if the docs are able to build can be done with Netlify now

closes algolia/react-instantsearch#33

* exit with a non-zero code to test if build fails

* Revert "exit with a non-zero code to test if build fails"

This reverts commit de118650560294c7a8019e227ccf232f5521c0bf.
